sourcesContent:
// ProductData.js
const ProductData = [
  { 
    id: "p1",   // use string id for routing consistency
    name: "Sony WH-CH720 wireless headphone", 
    description: "Lightweight wireless headphones with noise cancellation and 35 hours of battery life.",
    price: 1999, 
    image: "/images/products/headphone.png",
    rating: 4.3 
  },
  { 
    id: "p2", 
    name: "Samsung S24", 
    description: "Flagship smartphone with powerful processor, AMOLED display, and advanced cameras.",
    price: 14999, 
    image: "/images/products/s24.avif",
    rating: 4.5
  },
  { 
    id: "p3", 
    name: "Apple Watch Series 9 (GPS)", 
    description: "Smartwatch with health tracking, fitness features, and seamless Apple ecosystem integration.",
    price: 4999, 
    image: "/images/products/series9.png",
    rating: 4.2
  },
  { 
    id: "p4", 
    name: "ASUS TUF 15.6 Gaming Laptop", 
    description: "Durable gaming laptop with high-refresh display, RTX graphics, and strong cooling.",
    price: 49999, 
    image: "/images/products/asusf15.png",
    rating: 4.6
  },
  { 
    id: "p5", 
    name: "Sony SRSBTV5 Portable NFC Bluetooth Speaker", 
    description: "Compact Bluetooth speaker with NFC pairing and clear sound output.",
    price: 2999, 
    image: "/images/products/sony.png",
    rating: 3.9
  },
  { 
    id: "p6", 
    name: "ASUS ROG Spatha X Wireless Mouse", 
    description: "High-performance gaming mouse with customizable buttons and RGB lighting.",
    price: 999, 
    image: "/images/products/asusmouse.avif",
    rating: 4.1
  },
  { 
    id: "p7", 
    name: "Samsung Projector 4K", 
    description: "Portable 4K projector with smart features for movies and gaming.",
    price: 1299, 
    image: "/images/products/projector.avif",
    rating: 3.8
  },
  { 
    id: "p8", 
    name: "MacBook Pro 16", 
    description: "Apple’s premium laptop with M-series chip, Retina display, and powerful performance.",
    price: 1599, 
    image: "/images/products/Macbook.webp",
    rating: 4.7
  },
];

export default ProductData;
